testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-storage > moves through initiating, uploading, and completed states
@stynx-web/angular-storage > handles selected files, quarantine completion, and generic failures
@stynx-web/angular-storage > rejects invalid files and surfaces upload failures
@stynx-web/angular-storage > calls the document API endpoints with normalized base URLs
@stynx-web/angular-storage > uploads files through XMLHttpRequest with progress, success, and failure paths
